HearingAttendee.Description: HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN PERSON
HEARING THE SOLICITORS FOR BOTH PARTIES
HEARING THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN PERSON AND THE SOLICITOR FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR
HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR NOT ATTENDING
HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE DEFENDANT AND THE CLAIMANT NOT ATTENDING
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE SOLICITOR FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR
HEARING THE SOLICITOR FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE COUNSEL FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR NOT ATTENDING
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR NOT ATTENDING
HEARING THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN PERSON AND COUNSEL FOR THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR
HEARING THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR IN PERSON AND THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR NOT ATTENDING
HEARING COUNSEL FOR THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR AND THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR IN PERSON

THE COURTS OWN MOTION. THE COURT HAS MADE THIS ORDER OF ITS OWN INITIATIVE WITHOUT A HEARING. IF YOU OBJECT TO THE ORDER, YOU MUST MAKE AN APPLICATION TO HAVE IT SET ASIDE, VARIED OR STAYED WITHIN 7 DAYS OF RECEIVING IT
